title: Domain models (19 models)

notes: 21 files created including barrel models.dart. 5 spec-gap notes surfaced by agent, all deferred to later phases: BatteryAlertConfig.enabled default true (spec says false), GpsLoggingConfig.intervalSeconds=60 (spec=30), StealthConfig.fakeName='Calendar' (spec='Music'), SessionLogEvent vocabulary mismatch with ChainEvent enum, 10 AppSettings fields dropped per plan (sessionLogRetentionDays, wrongPinThreshold, schemaVersion, pinLength). Design decisions made by agent: SessionPhase kept as sealed hierarchy (not enum), ChainEvent as flat enum (no per-case payload), ActionDeliveryStatus as sealed-class-with-const-constants. These land as D-MODELS-1 in decisions-log.
